rationale: Per VERIFIER-PROTOCOL.md §'What speed gate measures': Tier H is a cross-cutting subset of the existing C/D/E/F cases.  Re-running the bench with MEIJERG_BENCH_CHECK_SPEED=1 set asserts each case in this subset completes in ≤ 1500 ms at 50 dps.  This catches dispatcher-myopia regressions (a path that always falls through to Slater takes 50–500 ms per case via inner pFq evaluation; symbolic-first dispatch resolves microseconds).  v0.1 ships the cross-cutting structure; the 200-case LCG sweep called for in the bead spec is a follow-up bead.
